progression.rule: Increase only after all planned sets are completed at the top of the rep range with clean technique and RPE below 8.

zone2.placement: Prefer separate days or after lighter sessions; avoid adding it after heavy legs if recovery is low.

nutritionControl.rule: If waist increases faster than strength and body weight, reduce the calorie surplus.

caffeine.guardrail: Avoid late caffeine if sleep quality drops.

connectiveTissue.risk: protect tendons and ligaments from sudden jumps
rules: Use 2-3 warm-up sets before the first heavy exercise.
Avoid load jumps above 5% on working sets.
Do not progress weight when joint pain, tendon discomfort, or technique breakdown appears.
